title: Floral Crunchy Ethiopian Ackee Stir-fry
description: This egg-free-friendly Floral Crunchy Ethiopian Ackee Stir-fry is a monsoon dish featuring ackee with a touch of floral aromatics and crunchy textures for a refreshing start to your day.

ingredients.name: 2 cups fresh Ethiopian ackee, cleaned and sliced
ingredients.notes: Avoid undercooked or spoiled ackee as it can be toxic.

ingredients.name: A few sprigs of fresh rosemary leaves (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a floral note and extra flavor.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic, sauté until soft and translucent. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
If using rosemary, add it now along with ground cumin, stir well.
Toss the sliced ackee into the pan, sprinkle salt, and mix evenly.
Cook for about 5-7 minutes or until the ackee is heated through and crisp on the outside.
Serve hot with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice if desired.
